strengths: 15+ years of full-stack and distributed-systems engineering experience across diverse domains
Recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling at re:cinq
Strong software craftsmanship background with TDD, CI/CD, and microservices at high-throughput scale
concerns: No demonstrated executive-level leadership or experience scaling engineering teams from 10 to 30+
Lacks production multi-agent AI systems experience in regulated/high-stakes commercial environments
Limited fintech-infrastructure depth in credit risk, working-capital, or trade decisioning systems

key_factors.factor: Executive leadership and team scaling track record
Distributed systems and high-throughput backend expertise

response.justification: The candidate brings deep individual-contributor and senior engineering experience across distributed systems, microservices, and full-stack development, with recent emerging exposure to agentic AI tooling. However, the resume reflects senior/staff IC roles rather than executive leadership, with no evidence of scaling engineering organizations, governing outsourced delivery, or operating production multi-agent AI systems in regulated fintech contexts — gaps that are central to this CTO role.
